title: Correlated lateral join for latest-per-user
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_latest_comment/0` that returns each user with their single most-recent comment via a lateral join + correlated subquery. Use: `from u in User, as: :user, inner_lateral_join: c in subquery(from(c in Comment, where: c.user_id == parent_as(:user).id, order_by: [desc: c.inserted_at], limit: 1)), select: %{user_id: u.id, name: u.name, latest_comment_body: c.body}`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Lateral join + correlated subquery + parent_as. Multi-concept synthesis Claude rarely produces without explicit guidance.
research_citation: Ecto aggregates-and-subqueries hexdocs: 'inner_lateral_join: c in subquery(inner_query)'
